_comments.brand.domain: Registrable domain only. blog.<domain> and www.<domain> count as citations.
_comments.competitors: Zero competitors is allowed — pass an empty array [].
_comments.cadence: daily | weekly | monthly. Drives the cron schedule.
_comments.run_hour_local: 0-23. Hour of day for daily/weekly/monthly fire.
_comments.include_full_answers: 'on_demand' (default) or 'always'. On 'on_demand' the report shows only a short interpretive note quoting the surface-form context (~80 chars on either side) for any mentioned entity. On 'always' the report embeds the FULL LLM answer text verbatim whenever any tracked entity is mentioned. Long-form gets unwieldy fast at multiple prompts -- recommend 'on_demand' for daily runs.
_comments.ai_sources: Each adds per-result cost; see https://apify.com/apify/google-search-scraper for current pricing.
_comments.apify.dataset_name: Named dataset to append to. Created on first run if missing.
_comments.apify.kv_store_name: Named key-value store for long-term raw preservation. Each run writes one record per prompt with the full Apify dataset item (organic results, AI answers, citations w/ metadata).
